projects.name: pireel/pireel
projects.description: Open-source, backend-free AI video editor for talking-head video — storyboarding, designed graphics, kinetic captions, themes and in-browser WebCodecs export. Drivable by any AI agent over MCP.
projects.description_cn: 适用于头部说话视频的开源、无后端 AI 视频编辑器 — 故事板、设计图形、动态字幕、主题和浏览器内 WebCodecs 导出。可由任何 AI 代理通过 MCP 驱动。
